Internal Incident Report — Cyber event — Non-Public (미공개중요정보), distribution restricted until 공정공시
Issuer: Aeryun TeleSystems Co., Ltd. (SNX Main Board), Report date/time: 2026-06-02 19:10 KST
Summary: On 2026-05-28 we detected unauthorized access to the HR file share; containment enacted within 4 hours; investigation ongoing
PII exposure: two employee resident-registration numbers (주민등록번호) may have been accessed (e.g., 741102-1****** and 900415-2******), plus internal email aliases
Operational impact: 12% of June shipments to a key OEM may slip 3–5 days, exceeding our 5% internal issuer-relative materiality threshold
Public-status: the shipment delay and PII scope above are 미공개 as of this memo and must be handled as 중요정보; no external dissemination prior to 공정공시
Reference: our 2026-05-14 자율공시 on the Haneul e-Disclosure portal stated “no shipment delays and limited data exposure”; that statement remains public and is not yet corrected
Additionally, the 2026-05-15 media statement reiterated that assessment; this broad communication remains accurate as of that date but does not reflect the new shipment risk
Selective disclosure risk: do not share incident details in 1:1 vendor or investor calls; if briefing is required, prepare simultaneous 공정공시 and post to the portal at the same time as any call
Blackout window: IR blackout is in effect from 2026-06-01 until release of 2Q 잠정실적; all insiders are restricted from trading per Policy 4.2, including ESOP exercises
Disclosure timing plan: draft 수시공시 (material fact) to SNX Listings Department by 2026-06-04, target posting 2026-06-05 08:30 KST (before market open), subject to final materiality confirmation
Regulatory liaison: we are assessing whether the event triggers a report to the Financial Markets Supervision Bureau (금융시장감독국, FMSB) under network-stability guidance; defer outreach until 공시 decision is finalized
Deal sensitivity: pending supply-price revision with Narae Micro Devices may be accelerated due to the downtime; the counterparty has not been informed—treat this as MNPI and coordinate via Legal
Employment note: one contractor account (Mr. Kim Do-hyeon, 사원) was misused for lateral movement; his badge is deactivated and password reset; no payroll bank numbers were stored in the affected folder
Benign/unrelated: last month’s community volunteering day and cafeteria hour changes remain as posted on our website and are unrelated to the incident
Contacts: Ms. Yoon Seul-gi (IR Director) ir@aeryun-telesystems.example.kr; Compliance: compliance@aeryun-telesystems.example.kr; Security: team-sec@aeryun-telesystems.example.kr
